Baseline: Individual planning based on local history, intuition, and previous sales
Online Platform: Planning supported by online orders, transaction data, and limited demand visibility
MOEE: Mission-oriented planning synchronized through PUDAL and MSRS recommendations

Baseline: No explicit ecosystem-level coordination; stakeholders act independently
Online Platform: Transaction-level coordination between users and vendors through a platform
MOEE: Multi-stakeholder coordination among students, vendors, suppliers, university, operator, and regulator

Baseline: Fragmented and informal; information remains local to each stakeholder
Online Platform: Order, payment, and demand data are shared through the digital platform
MOEE: Shared ecosystem state includes demand, capacity, RMOV accounts, PSKVE flows, scenarios, and metrics

Baseline: Local survival and short-term stakeholder utility
Online Platform: Transaction efficiency, convenience, and sales growth
MOEE: Ecosystem Value Index combining fulfillment, mission achievement, sustainability, satisfaction, profitability, and waste reduction

Baseline: Open-loop or weak feedback based on delayed observation
Online Platform: Partial feedback from digital transactions and user behavior
MOEE: Closed-loop PUDAL cycle: Perception, Understanding, Decision, Action, Learning
Multi-Stakeholder Recommendation System generates coordinated recommendation vectors

Baseline: Mission intensity emerges independently from each stakeholder decision
Online Platform: Mission intensity is partially informed by online demand signals
MOEE: Mission intensity is explicitly synchronized across stakeholders

Baseline: Products and payments are visible informally; service, knowledge, value, and environmental effects are mostly implicit
Online Platform: Products, services, and payments become digitally visible; knowledge and environmental effects remain limited
MOEE: Product, Service, Knowledge, Value, and Environment exchanges are modeled explicitly

Baseline: Resources, mission, outputs, and value are not systematically accounted
Online Platform: Outputs and financial value are partially captured through transactions
MOEE: Each stakeholder maintains Resource, Mission, Output, and Value accounts

Baseline: Sustainability is incidental and usually reactive
Online Platform: Sustainability may be tracked as an additional feature but is not central
MOEE: Sustainability is embedded in objective functions, scenarios, and EVI

Baseline: Low; response depends on individual adaptation
Online Platform: Moderate; platform data helps adaptation but may not coordinate stakeholders
MOEE: High potential; scenario engine and PUDAL support coordinated adaptation
AI-assisted multi-agent reasoning, PUDAL control, MSRS policies, and digital twin simulation

Baseline: Efficient only under stable and predictable conditions
MOEE: Improved mission achievement, sustainability, resilience, and ecosystem value
